title: White Label
lede: Resellers and agencies can run iMash under their own brand — your logo, your company name, and your own domain — so your team and clients see your business, not iMash.

steps.title: What white-label gives you
steps.content:
• A fully branded dashboard: your logo in the header and sidebar, your company name image, and your own custom domain (for example dashboard.yourcompany.com).
  • Anyone who signs in through your domain sees your branding throughout the app.
  • New users who sign up on your white-label domain are automatically linked to your account.

White-label is a reseller/agency capability. If you don't see the White Label settings, contact iMash support to have it enabled for your account.

images.caption: White-label lets resellers run iMash under their own brand and domain
White-label lets resellers run iMash under their own brand and domain

steps.title: Open the White Label settings
steps.content:
1. Go to CRM Settings (/crm/settings) or open Account Settings from the left navigation.
  2. Select the White Label tab.
  3. You'll see the White-Label Settings card where you upload branding and set your domain.

steps.title: Upload your logo and company name image
steps.content:
1. Upload your logo image — this replaces the iMash mark in the header and sidebar.
  2. Upload your company name image that appears alongside the logo.
  3. Preview how they look, then continue to the custom domain.

Use clean, high-resolution images with transparent backgrounds so they look sharp in both light and dark mode.

steps.title: Set up your custom domain
steps.content:
1. In the Custom Domain field, enter the domain your clients will use (for example dashboard.yourdomain.com).
  2. Follow the on-screen DNS instructions to point that domain at our servers.
  3. Click Save White-Label Settings.

Once DNS propagates, visiting your domain loads iMash fully branded as your business.

cards.title: Team Management
cards.description: Add staff under your branded account.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
